preguntas.pregunta: We use our eyes to see.
preguntas.explicacion: Correct! We use our eyes for sight.

preguntas.pregunta: The auditory nerve connects the eye to the brain.
preguntas.explicacion: The auditory nerve connects the ear to the brain.

preguntas.pregunta: The pupil is part of the eye.
preguntas.explicacion: Correct! The pupil is part of the eye.

preguntas.pregunta: The outer ear is inside the head.
preguntas.explicacion: The outer ear is the part we can see outside.

preguntas.pregunta: Which part of the body do we use to hear?
preguntas.explicacion: We use our ears to hear.

preguntas.pregunta: Which one is part of the eye?
preguntas.explicacion: The iris is the coloured part of the eye.

preguntas.pregunta: Which part carries sound information to the brain?
preguntas.explicacion: The auditory nerve sends sound information to the brain.
The eyelid helps protect the eye.

preguntas.pregunta: What sense do we use with our eyes?
preguntas.explicacion: We use sight with our eyes.

preguntas.pregunta: What sense do we use with our ears?
preguntas.explicacion: We use hearing with our ears.

preguntas.pregunta: Name one part of the eye.
preguntas.explicacion: Iris, pupil, eyelid and eyelashes are parts of the eye.

preguntas.pregunta: Name one part of the ear.
preguntas.explicacion: Outer ear, middle ear, inner ear and auditory nerve are parts of hearing.

preguntas.pista: It receives information from the eyes and ears.
preguntas.explicacion: The brain receives information from the senses.

preguntas.pista: We use it to hear sounds.
The coloured part of the eye.
preguntas.explicacion: The iris is the coloured part of the eye.

preguntas.pista: A small dark circle in the eye.
preguntas.explicacion: The pupil is the dark part in the centre of the eye.

preguntas.frase_audio: We use our eyes to see.
preguntas.pregunta: What do we use to see?
preguntas.explicacion: Yes! We use our eyes to see.

preguntas.frase_audio: The auditory nerve sends information to the brain.
preguntas.pregunta: Where does the auditory nerve send information?
preguntas.pregunta_es: ¿A dónde envía la información el nervio auditivo?
preguntas.explicacion: Correct! It sends information to the brain.

preguntas.frase_audio: The outer ear is the part of the ear we can see.
preguntas.pregunta: Which part of the ear can we see?
preguntas.explicacion: Good job! We can see the outer ear.
